title: Implement C DutyCycleTracker matching CCP-13 test vectors
description: Implement fixed-size (N=32) DutyCycleTracker in existing L2/HAL files matching Rust/Python and ccp13.json vectors. Add to lichen_l2_tx under CONFIG_LICHEN_DUTY_CYCLE. Add test to tests/hal/src/main.c. No new files, no comments, follow C conventions. Verify with vectors, run tests, do not weaken tests.
